summary: Completed comprehensive testing of multi-language support feature for THE BRIDGE travel website. All 5 languages (English, French, Spanish, German, Portuguese) are fully functional with complete content translation across all sections.
passed_tests: Language selector dropdown functionality in navigation
All 5 languages (EN, FR, ES, DE, PT) available and working
French translation - hero section, navigation, experience cards, contact form, footer
Spanish translation - hero section, navigation, concept section
German translation - hero section and content
Portuguese translation - hero section and content
Language preference persistence in localStorage ('thebridge-language' key)
Experience cards translation with localized titles and descriptions
Contact form labels and buttons translation
Footer content translation including company info and links
Language persistence after page reload on both desktop and mobile
Smooth language switching without page refresh
All website sections translate properly (hero, concept, experiences, trips, testimonials, about, contact, footer)
